summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Invoice Payment functionality for CRM Alpha Agency. All backend APIs (POST/GET/DELETE payments) and frontend UI features are working correctly. Payment tracking, automatic status updates, and visibility rules are all functioning as expected.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/invoices/{id}/payments - Add payment to invoice (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/invoices/{id}/payments - List payments for invoice (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/invoices/{id}/payments/{payment_id} - Delete payment (200 OK)
Backend: Automatic status update to 'partiellement_payée' after partial payment
Backend: Automatic status update to 'payée' after full payment
Backend: Status reverts to 'partiellement_payée' after payment deletion
Backend: 404 returned for non-existent invoice
Backend: All payment methods accepted (virement, chèque, carte, espèces)
Backend: FAC-2025-0001 has correct payment data (1000€ paid, 1712.50€ remaining)
Backend: FAC-2026-0002 has status 'payee' (old spelling)
Frontend: 'Payé' column visible in invoices table
Frontend: Progress bar shown for partially paid invoices
Frontend: '+ Paiement' button visible only for non-paid, non-brouillon invoices
Frontend: Payment dialog opens with correct fields (amount, date, method, notes)
Frontend: Payment dialog pre-fills remaining amount
Frontend: Invoice detail view shows Paiements section
Frontend: Payment summary cards (Total facture, Payé, Reste à payer)
Frontend: Payments list with date, method, amount, delete action
Frontend: 'Ajouter un paiement' option in dropdown menu for partial invoices
Frontend: Payment button hidden for brouillon invoices (FAC-2026-0009, FAC-2026-0004)
Frontend: Payment button hidden for payée invoices (FAC-2026-0002)
Frontend: Payment button visible for partiellement_payée invoices (FAC-2025-0001)
seed_data_creation: Test invoice created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice payment functionality fully tested. FAC-2025-0001 has 1 payment of 1000€ (status: partiellement_payée). FAC-2026-0002 has old status 'payee' without accent. Backend uses 'payée' (with accent) for new payments. Frontend handles both spellings correctly.
